scripts.build: bun run build:backend && bun run build:agent-runner && bun run build:web
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run build
scripts.build:agent-runner: cd agent-runner && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run build
scripts.build:web: cd web && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run build
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.test: bun run test:backend && bun run test:agent-runner && bun run test:web
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run test
scripts.test:agent-runner: cd agent-runner && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run test
scripts.test:web: cd web && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run test
scripts.lint: bun run lint:backend && bun run lint:agent-runner && bun run lint:web
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run lint
scripts.lint:agent-runner: cd agent-runner && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run lint
scripts.lint:web: cd web && (bun install --frozen-lockfile 2>/dev/null || bun install) && bun run lint
scripts.coverage: bun run coverage:backend && bun run coverage:agent-runner && bun run coverage:web
scripts.coverage:backend: mkdir -p coverage && cd backend && bun run test:coverage
scripts.coverage:agent-runner: mkdir -p coverage && cd agent-runner && bun run test:coverage
scripts.coverage:web: mkdir -p coverage && cd web && bun run test:coverage
scripts.docker:build: cd deployments && docker build -t openhive-team -f Dockerfile.team ..
scripts.docker: mkdir -p .run && chmod a+w data .run && cd deployments && docker compose up --build -d
scripts.docker:clean: cd deployments && docker compose down --rmi local --volumes && rm -rf ../.run && mkdir -p ../.run
scripts.clean: docker system prune -af; rm -rf coverage/ backend/dist/ backend/node_modules/ agent-runner/dist/ agent-runner/node_modules/ web/dist/ web/node_modules/
